title: Reported Speech
topics: tense backshift · reporting verbs · questions · commands
description: Nepřímá řeč — jak převést přímou řeč do nepřímé.
notes: Tense backshift: present simple → past simple
✓ 'I work here.' → She said she WORKED there.
✓ 'I will call.' → He said he WOULD call.
Tense backshift: present perfect → past perfect
✓ 'I have finished.' → She said she HAD finished.
⚠️  Questions — no question mark, normal word order:
✓ 'Where do you live?' → He asked where I LIVED.
✓ 'Sit down!' → She told me TO SIT down.

examples.cz: She said (that) she was very happy.
He asked if/whether I would come.
She warned me not to open that door.

quiz.sentence: 'I am tired.' → She said she ___ tired.
'Are you coming?' → He asked ___ I was coming.
'Don't be late!' → She told him ___ to be late.
'I will help you.' → She promised she ___ help me.
'Where do you live?' → He asked where I ___.

tasks: 1. Report what someone said to you recently (5 sentences)
2. Convert this dialogue to reported speech:
3. Write a news article reporting what a politician said (use varied reporting verbs)
